prompt:
Create a premium technical infographic poster of 
[CAR NAME], featuring a giant central full-body cutaway view with all main components visible, plus detailed exploded views of each module around it: engine, battery, suspension, motors, drive unit, thermal system, steering, chassis, electronics, interior systems, and structural frame.

Clean background, ultra-detailed engineering style, premium typography, luxury product presentation, highly detailed specs, collector poster aesthetic, cinematic masterpiece.
